message:
feat(sdk): add abort support, state inspection, and thinking level mutation

Expand the AgentSessionHandle embedding API with methods that library
consumers need for real-world integration:

- prompt_with_abort(): send a user prompt with an explicit AbortSignal
  for cooperative cancellation
- new_abort_handle(): factory for AbortHandle/AbortSignal pairs
- model(): return the active (provider, model_id) tuple
- thinking_level(): return the currently configured ThinkingLevel
- set_thinking_level(): update thinking level, persist to session
  metadata (model header + thinking_level_change entry), and update
  the agent's stream options
- messages(): return all model messages for the current session path
- state(): return a lightweight AgentSessionState snapshot containing
  session_id, provider, model_id, thinking_level, save_enabled, and
  message_count
- session_mut() promoted to const fn

Also adds the AgentSessionState struct with Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq
derives for easy comparison in tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
